summary: Crystal‑clear audience recording captures a scorching summer‑1982 show with standout Franklin’s Tower, Sailor>Saint jam and a heavy Estimated Prophet.
review: The concert is praised for its hot playing across both sets, highlighted by an inspired Franklin’s Tower/Sailor→Saint sequence and one of the heaviest Estimated Prophet performances of ’82. Reviewers repeatedly note that the audience recording feels “out of this world,” delivering immersive, high‑fidelity sound with no reported flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are very positive (average 4.8 stars) and consistently commend both the musical performance and the exceptional audience recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers describe the audience tape as crystal‑clear, immersive and “out of this world,” with no mention of dropouts or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Both sets are described as “sick‑o” and hot, with seamless energy throughout; the show is regarded as one of the top performances of the 1982 summer tour.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Fumbles three verses on Franklin's Tower but overall strong guitar work noted.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent's keyboard contributions during the jams are highlighted as amazing, especially on the heavy Estimated Prophet version.
